name: Aurora

description.en: A clean, glassy SaaS kit — cool slate + blue, Sora display, glassmorphism cards and a gradient highlight. Light + dark, EN/AR + RTL. Runnable React app with landing, pricing, dashboard and a components showcase.
description.ar: حزمة SaaS أنيقة وزجاجية — رمادي بارد وأزرق، خط Sora للعناوين، بطاقات زجاجية ولمسة تدرّج لوني. فاتح وداكن، عربي/إنجليزي مع RTL كامل. تطبيق React جاهز للتشغيل بصفحة هبوط وأسعار ولوحة تحكم ومعرض مكوّنات.

prompt: A clean SaaS kit with a glassy dashboard. Blue primary (#3b82f6), Inter body + Sora display, glassmorphism cards, soft glass shadow, light + dark. React-first. Ship a dashboard and a landing page template, with EN/AR + RTL.
buildSteps: Derived design tokens (colors, Sora/Inter, 1rem radius, soft glass shadow) → tokens.json, theme.css (v4) and tailwind-preset.js (v3).
Built React components on a shared `cn` util: Button, Card, Input, Badge, Pill, Mark, Marquee, Container.
Composed blocks (StatCards, Footer), then assembled the Landing, Pricing, Dashboard and Showcase templates.
Wrote the bundled consumer skill (.claude/skills/aurora) so AI builds with the kit cheaply.
Emitted uikit.json, validated it against the contract, and authored screenshots.
consumeSteps: cd my-app/react && pnpm install && pnpm dev
Open in Claude Code and ask: 'build a billing dashboard using this kit'
